title: elymus virginicus var. australis
intro: Elymus virginicus var. australis, also known as Virginia wild rye, is a perennial grass native to Eastern North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Elymus virginicus var. australis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
